title: kyllinga comosipes subsp. decolorans
intro: Kyllinga comosipes subsp. decolorans, also known as the brown Kyllinga, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. In herbal preparations, Kyllinga comosipes subsp. decolorans can be found in teas, infusions, and poultices, often used to treat a range of ailments.
